case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CATHERINE SAUNDERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033217), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAUNDERS, CATHERINE AKA CATHERINE A. SAUNDERS
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 64164316) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAUNDERS, CATHERINE AKA CATHERINE A. SAUNDERS $1,908.81 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,167.76, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
